summary:
Claim: The thumb is excluded in FINDER-based fingerprinting.  
Evidence: - NIST studies show thumb prints have lower resolution and higher noise, reducing match accuracy. - Field operations report longer alignment times and increased errors due to poor stability.  
Answer: B: Thumb.  

(497 tokens) ✅
